name: NBAdex
short: The ultimate NBA draft simulator with full historical player database.
description: NBAdex is a fully featured NBA fantasy draft game with 400+ all-time players, multiple draft modes (Snake, Auction, Best Ball, Random), position requirements, Discord UI dropdowns & buttons, season simulation, and rankings. Draft legends from every era and find out who built the best team.
end_user_data_statement: NBAdex stores Discord user IDs and draft data (team rosters, draft picks, settings) per guild. Data is retained until the guild data is cleared or NBAdex is removed.
install_msg: **NBAdex is ready!** Use `[p]nbadraft modes` to see all draft modes, then `[p]nbadraft create` to start a draft. Type `[p]help nbadraft` for all commands.
author: jaffar21
